metadata.name: Request Copy of a Cashed Check

description: A customer needs a copy of a specific check that has already been cashed for their records.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and gather the check details (number, date, amount).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the necessary information to locate the check image.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the front and back images of the cashed check from the archive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds and retrieves the check images.

nodes.task_description: Provide the check images to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the images to the customer's secure message center.
